summary: Iteration 9: Major Feed UI Redesign Testing - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Verified mosaic layout, 3D tilt cards (structure only - hover requires mouse), giant background emoji art, sparkline charts, view/comment counters, hero card spanning 2 columns, category filter pills with emoji icons, spring-animated active indicator, count badges, smooth content transitions, and mobile responsive layout.
passed_tests: Feed loads with 'YOUR NEWS' as default tab for logged-in user (sectest@test.com with onboarding_complete=true)
YOUR NEWS has purple gradient background with shadow when active
YOUR NEWS shows count badge (30) when active
All 10 category pills visible: YOUR NEWS, ALL, MARKETS, TECH, ECONOMY, CRYPTO, AI, SCIENCE, CELEB, STYLE
Each category pill shows emoji icon: ✨, 🌍, 📈, ⚡, 💰, 🪙, 🤖, 🔬, 🎬, ✨
Active category pill has colored background with shadow matching category color
CRYPTO active shows orange color identity
MARKETS active shows green color identity
STYLE active shows purple color identity
Count badges appear on active pills (CRYPTO: 3, AI: 2, TECH: 1, YOUR NEWS: 30)
Switching categories filters content with smooth animation (AnimatePresence)
Hero card (first card) spans 2 columns (col-span-2 class verified)
Hero card shows description text for topic
All cards show: category label with emoji, time ago, trend score badge with fire emoji
Cards show view counter (Eye icon + count like 17.6k)
Cards show comment counter (MessageCircle icon + count like 460)
Sparkline chart renders with colored bars based on trend_score
Header shows 'WTF is happening?' title with globe emoji 🌍
LIVE indicator animates (opacity pulsing)
Trending count badge shows total topics (20 trending)
Reading count badge shows (42k reading)
Refresh button works and triggers feed reload
Cards are clickable and navigate to explanation view
Explanation view shows WHAT/WHY/YOU tabs and back button
Mobile viewport (375px) - Feed renders correctly
Mobile - Hero card adapts to full width
Mobile - Category pills scroll horizontally (scrollbar-hide class)
Mobile - Card click navigates to explanation view
Grid maintains 2-column layout (grid-cols-2) on all viewports
Giant background emoji visible on cards (low opacity, positioned bottom-right)
TiltCard component structure correct (3D transform CSS applied)
critical_code_review_comments: TrendingFeed.js: CATEGORIES array correctly defines 10 categories with key, label, emoji, color, bg, and activeBg
TrendingFeed.js: Default activeCategory set correctly based on user?.onboarding_complete
TrendingFeed.js: MosaicCard component properly handles isHero prop for 2-column span
TrendingFeed.js: Sparkline component generates bar heights from trend_score seed
TrendingFeed.js: View/comment counts derived from trend_score (views = 8000 + score*80 + random)
TrendingFeed.js: AnimatePresence mode='wait' provides smooth category switch animations
TrendingFeed.js: TiltCard has 3D transform on mouse move (tested structure, not actual hover)
index.css: line-clamp-3 and scrollbar-hide utilities correctly defined
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified complete feed UI redesign. All mosaic layout features working: hero card 2-column span, category pills with emoji/colors/count badges, sparkline charts, view/comment counters, smooth animations, mobile responsive layout. 3D tilt effect structure verified but actual hover interaction requires mouse. Categories tested: YOUR NEWS, ALL, MARKETS, TECH, CRYPTO, AI, STYLE - all filter content correctly with smooth transitions.
